videoSnippet.title: "The First 2900 Player ||" Veselin Topalov vs Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş || Clash of Generations III G3
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Topalov, Veselin (2717) - Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2687)
Topalov vs. Erdogmus: Clash of Generations III (Chess.com) [03] 2026.04.14
B27 Sicilian, Hungarian variation

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 g6 3.Bc4 d6 4.O-O Bg7 5.Re1 Nf6 6.d3 Nc6 7.Nc3 Bg4 8.h3 Bxf3 9.Qxf3 O-O 10.Qd1 e6 11.a3 a6 12.Ba2 b5 13.Bf4 Nh5 14.Be3 Rb8 15.Qc1 Qd7 16.Nd1 Rfc8 17.Bh6 Nf6 18.Bxg7 Kxg7 19.Qf4 d5 20.e5 Ng8 21.Ne3 b4 22.a4 Qd8 23.c3 Qa5 24.Rac1 bxc3 25.bxc3 Rb2 26.Bb1 Rcb8 27.h4 R8b3 28.c4 d4 29.Ng4 Qb4 30.Qe4 Nce7 31.Bc2 Rc3 32.Qe2 Rcxc2 33.Qe4 Rc3
